issues: 'Project Portfolio' card still says 'from steel price forecasting to patient risk assessment systems' - description not updated to reflect new EasyBot/HypoTestX projects

context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features working: theme toggle (dark #050505 / light #F8F7F4), resume download (/resume.pdf), Open Source nav + page with tabs (Overview/Features/Quick Start), GitHub + PyPI buttons, HypoTestX stats (v1.0.6, 532 tests), Projects page with EasyBot+HypoTestX as first two with Featured badges, Open Source filter showing HypoTestX(1), HypoTestX modal with GitHub+PyPI links, Home page Open Source spotlight with pip install + Learn More, EasyBot on home page.
